instruction: Walk into the bedroom on the right of the stairs. Take a left before you reach the bed and wlk straight into the bathroom. Stop outside of the little room with the toilet.

text:
Episode ended — I issued STOP at the threshold between the bedroom and bathroom, positioned just outside the toilet/shower area of the bathroom, which matches the instruction's endpoint: "Stop outside of the little room with the toilet."

Summary of path taken:
1. Started at stair landing, identified bedroom accessible via right-hand hallway loop (closet) and directly to the left — confirmed both led to the same bedroom (blue/orange bedspread).
2. Explored a dead-end guest bedroom and closet before locating the actual left-turn connection from the bedroom's closet/walk-in area into the bathroom.
3. Entered the bathroom (shower, toilet, sink visible, open-plan with no separate walled toilet closet).
4. Positioned at the doorway/threshold just outside the toilet area and confirmed via look_around before calling STOP.
